query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT companyId) as companies_with_data, COUNT(*) as total_records, COUNT(CASE WHEN expectedAnnualLoss IS NOT NULL AND expectedAnnualLoss != '' AND expectedAnnualLoss != '0' THEN 1 END) as non_zero_records FROM supplyChainRisks
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ovDZf4AdgM1wjio.bac7ad92b374 --database Rur7xAEUjvByHVg3PaP3cz --execute SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT companyId) as companies_with_data, COUNT(*) as total_records, COUNT(CASE WHEN expectedAnnualLoss IS NOT NULL AND expectedAnnualLoss != '' AND expectedAnnualLoss != '0' THEN 1 END) as non_zero_records FROM supplyChainRisks
